data.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: Machine-specific paths committed to tracked files. .dso-plugin-path is orphaned (zero references). dso-config.conf breaks dso shim on other machines. CLAUDE.md misleads agent. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: (1) Delete .dso-plugin-path, (2) make dso.plugin_root relative, (3) update CLAUDE.md.
